description: Schema and metadata for Gaming Assistant prompt packs. Bundled packs are loaded as Python resources; the loader validates each pack against the 'pack_schema' below and rejects invalid files with a warning.

version.description: Semantic version of the pack, e.g. '1.0' or '1.2.3'. Optional.

game_id.description: Stable upstream game identifier (e.g. Steam AppID, IGDB slug). Optional.

keywords.description: Window-title / app-name substrings used to auto-select this pack.

system_prompt.description: System role injected when this pack is active.

additional_context.description: Extra context appended in non-compact mode only.

spoiler_defaults.description: Per-category spoiler baseline; merged into the game profile on first use.

constraints.description: Optional runtime constraints for this pack.

min_model_params_b.description: Minimum model size in billions of parameters.

requires_vision.description: If true, refuse to run under text-only backends.

examples.description: Optional few-shot examples for authors to document typical tips.
